headline: Exelon Corporation (EXC) Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.42 per Share
summary: Exelon Corporation (NASDAQ:EXC) is included among the 10 Best Electrical Infrastructure Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. Exelon Corporation (NASDAQ:EXC) is one of the country’s largest utility companies, serving more than 10 million customers through six fully regulated transmission and distribution utilities. On April 28, Exelon Corporation (NASDAQ:EXC) declared a quarterly dividend of $0.42 […]
